name: operation Thunderstrike
description: This is a demo of the game Operation Thunderstrike. The game has infleunces from classic titles like Metal Slug, Heavy Weapon and Silkworm This is a fast shooting Shmup game where you are in control of either a Tank or a helicopter. Make use of the upgrades throughput the game to make it to the boss at the end of the level! Do you like the game? Got any comments? Dont hesitate and click the links within the game to go to the developers fb page or Itch.io page. Enjoy!
instructions: Mobile touch screen Keyboard TANK - left right move tank - Up Down move turret - V fire Bullet - C Fire Cannon - X Jump HELICOPTER - Left Right Up Down move heli - V Shoot Bullet - C Shoot Cannon
